prompt: 画一下 Kubernetes 的架构
text:
Kubernetes 的架构主要由 **控制平面 (Control Plane)** 和 **工作节点 (Worker Node)** 组成，采用典型的“大脑-四肢”工作模式。控制平面负责做出全局决策、调度资源和响应集群事件；而工作节点则负责实际运行应用程序的容器。

你可以将 kube-apiserver 视作整个系统的前台，所有内部组件和外部用户的请求都必须经过它，而 etcd 则是集群唯一的持久化记忆库。

```show-widget
{"title": "kubernetes_architecture", "widget_code": "<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 680 460">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="context-stroke" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- User / kubectl Input -->
  <g class="node" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 kubectl 和 Kubernetes API 的交互过程')">
    <text class="th" x="170" y="20" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">kubectl / UI</text>
    <line x1="170" y1="32" x2="170" y2="130" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- CONTROL PLANE -->
  <g class="c-gray">
    <rect x="30" y="80" width="280" height="340" rx="20" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="170" y="110" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Control Plane</text>
  </g>

  <!-- API Server -->
  <g class="node c-purple" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 kube-apiserver 的工作原理')">
    <rect x="70" y="140" width="200" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="170" y="158" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">kube-apiserver</text>
    <text class="ts" x="170" y="176" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Cluster gateway</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Scheduler -->
  <g class="node c-purple" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 kube-scheduler 的调度机制')">
    <rect x="40" y="226" width="120" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="100" y="244" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">kube-scheduler</text>
    <text class="ts" x="100" y="262" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Assigns pods</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Controller Manager -->
  <g class="node c-purple" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 kube-controller-manager 的职责')">
    <rect x="180" y="226" width="120" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="240" y="244" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Controller Mgr</text>
    <text class="ts" x="240" y="262" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Maintains state</text>
  </g>

  <!-- etcd -->
  <g class="node c-purple" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 etcd 在 Kubernetes 中的作用')">
    <rect x="70" y="312" width="200" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="170" y="330" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">etcd</text>
    <text class="ts" x="170" y="348" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Cluster state store</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Control Plane Connections -->
  <path d="M 170 196 L 170 206 L 100 206 L 100 216" fill="none" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <path d="M 170 196 L 170 206 L 240 206 L 240 216" fill="none" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <line x1="170" y1="196" x2="170" y2="302" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>


  <!-- WORKER NODE -->
  <g class="c-gray">
    <rect x="370" y="80" width="280" height="340" rx="20" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="510" y="110" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Worker Node</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Kubelet -->
  <g class="node c-blue" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 kubelet 的职责和运行机制')">
    <rect x="380" y="140" width="120" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="440" y="158" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">kubelet</text>
    <text class="ts" x="440" y="176" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Manages node</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Kube-proxy -->
  <g class="node c-blue" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 kube-proxy 如何处理网络和服务发现')">
    <rect x="520" y="140" width="120" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="580" y="158" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">kube-proxy</text>
    <text class="ts" x="580" y="176" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Network rules</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Container Runtime -->
  <g class="node c-blue" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 Kubernetes 的容器运行时 (CRI)')">
    <rect x="380" y="226" width="260" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="510" y="238" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Container Runtime</text>
    <text class="ts" x="510" y="256" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Runs containers</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Pod 1 -->
  <g class="node c-teal" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 Kubernetes 中的 Pod')">
    <rect x="380" y="290" width="120" height="106" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="440" y="310" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Pod</text>
    <g class="c-gray">
      <rect x="390" y="326" width="100" height="26" rx="4" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      <text class="ts" x="440" y="339" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">App Container</text>
      <rect x="390" y="358" width="100" height="26" rx="4" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      <text class="ts" x="440" y="371" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Sidecar</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Pod 2 -->
  <g class="node c-teal" onclick="window.__widgetSendMessage('详细介绍 Pod 的网络和存储共享机制')">
    <rect x="520" y="290" width="120" height="106" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="580" y="310" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Pod</text>
    <g class="c-gray">
      <rect x="530" y="326" width="100" height="26" rx="4" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      <text class="ts" x="580" y="339" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">App Container</text>
      <rect x="530" y="358" width="100" height="26" rx="4" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      <text class="ts" x="580" y="371" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Volume</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- API Server to Worker Node Connections -->
  <line x1="270" y1="168" x2="370" y2="168" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <path d="M 230 140 L 230 125 L 580 125 L 580 130" fill="none" class="leader" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>

  <!-- Worker Node Internal Connections -->
  <line x1="440" y1="196" x2="440" y2="216" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <line x1="440" y1="270" x2="440" y2="280" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <line x1="580" y1="270" x2="580" y2="280" class="arr" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>

</svg>"}
```

这里补充几个关键的架构特点：
* **声明式管理**：所有的控制平面组件都在不断监控（Watch）集群的当前状态，并努力使其与用户在 etcd 中记录的“期望状态”保持一致。
* **组件解耦**：调度器、控制器和 API Server 彼此互不直接通信，所有组件只与 API Server 进行交互，而 API Server 是唯一有权读写 etcd 的组件。
* **Pod 是最小单位**：Kubernetes 并不直接管理容器，而是管理 Pod。一个 Pod 内可以包含一个或多个紧密相连的容器（如包含 Sidecar 容器），它们共享网络 IP 和存储卷。

你可以点击上图中的任意组件，我会为你进一步详细介绍它的核心职责和工作原理。
